diagrams.title: Global E-Waste Generation Distribution
diagrams.description: World map showing e-waste generation by region with Asia (50%), Americas (25%), Europe (20%), Africa (5%)
diagrams.purpose: Understand regional distribution and identify major e-waste generating regions

diagrams.title: E-Waste Management Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Inverted pyramid showing preference order for e-waste management from most to least desirable
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the priority approach for sustainable e-waste management

diagrams.title: E-Waste Composition and Hazardous Elements
diagrams.description: Cross-section diagram of electronic device showing location of toxic materials
elements: Lead in solder and CRT screens
diagrams.purpose: Identify hazardous substances for safe handling during recycling

diagrams.title: E-Waste Trade Flow Map
diagrams.description: Global map showing illegal e-waste flow from developed to developing countries
diagrams.purpose: Understand illegal e-waste trade patterns and Basel Convention role

visuals.title: Global Context In E Waste
visuals.description: Visual diagram for global context in e waste
